name: Spine Needle Chains
descriptionTemplate: Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}; this damage enjoys [Arg4]% {Counter} bonus. Each attack temporarily reduces the target's {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg3]. {Leap}: Spend 5 {Dreamlure}. If successful, refund the Arithmetica consumed and deal damage 2 more times; otherwise, gain 2 {Dreamlure}.
